title: F1 2023 Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2023 texturepack by AdamixGaming, Jerpix and NotGatoz | required OptiFine!!!
body:
Mercedes Safety Car

    all boat with chest (without bamboo raft)


Aston Martin Safety Car

    Bamboo Chest Raft

No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car


oak_boat

    Ferrari 16,55

spruce_boat

    VCARB 22,30
    Haas 20,27 (if old version)

birch_boat

    Alpine 10,31

jungle_boat

    RedBull 1,11

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 4,81

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 44,63

cherry_boat

    Aston Martin 14,18

mangrove_boat

    Williams 23,3

bamboo_boat

    Alfa Rome 77,24

(if new version)
pale_oak

    HAAS 20,27
**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove | bamboo | pale_oak (if new version)>",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<soft | medium | hard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"22_hard\""} (old version)
/summon pale_oak_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"\"27_hard\""} (new version)
